name: che-word-mcp
description: Swift-native MCP server for Microsoft Word document (.docx) manipulation. v3.5.3: atomic-rename save (closes #36) — DocxWriter.write now writes to <url>.tmp.<UUID> + fsync + replaceItemAt; any throw leaves original byte-preserved. v3.5.2: rels overlay merge (closes #35). v3.5.1: universal binary (x86_64+arm64). v3.5.0: true byte-preservation. Built on ooxml-swift 0.13.2.
